symbols.name: pemToCryptoKey
symbols.signature: async function pemToCryptoKey(pem: string, algorithm: "Ed25519" | "X25519", undefined: unknown): Promise<CryptoKey>
symbols.description: Convert a PEM-encoded private key to a CryptoKey

symbols.name: generateSigningKeyPair
symbols.description: Generate an Ed25519 keypair for signing

symbols.name: generateEncryptionKeyPair
symbols.description: Generate an X25519 keypair for encryption (ECDH)

symbols.name: sign
symbols.signature: async function sign<T>(privateKey: CryptoKey, payload: T): Promise<string>
symbols.description: Sign a payload with an Ed25519 private key

symbols.name: signWithHex
symbols.signature: async function signWithHex<T>(privateKeyHex: string, payload: T): Promise<string>
symbols.description: Sign a payload with an Ed25519 private key from hex

symbols.name: verify
symbols.signature: async function verify<T>(publicKeyHex: string, signatureHex: string, payload: T): Promise<boolean>
symbols.description: Verify a signature using Ed25519 public key

symbols.name: encrypt
symbols.signature: async function encrypt(data: Uint8Array, recipientPublicKeyHex: string): Promise<EncryptedPayload>
symbols.description: Encrypt data using X25519 ECDH + AES-GCM Uses ephemeral keypair for forward secrecy

symbols.name: decrypt
symbols.signature: async function decrypt(encryptedPayload: EncryptedPayload, recipientPrivateKey: CryptoKey): Promise<Uint8Array>
symbols.description: Decrypt data using X25519 ECDH + AES-GCM

symbols.name: decryptWithHex
symbols.signature: async function decryptWithHex(encryptedPayload: EncryptedPayload, recipientPrivateKeyHex: string): Promise<Uint8Array>
symbols.description: Decrypt data using private key from hex

symbols.name: createAuthenticatedMessage
symbols.signature: async function createAuthenticatedMessage<T>(payload: T, signers: Array<unknown>): Promise<AuthenticatedMessage<T>>
symbols.description: Create an authenticated message (signed but not encrypted)

symbols.name: createAuthenticatedMessageWithHex
symbols.signature: async function createAuthenticatedMessageWithHex<T>(payload: T, pubkeyHex: string, privateKeyHex: string): Promise<AuthenticatedMessage<T>>
symbols.description: Create an authenticated message with hex-encoded keys (convenience wrapper)

symbols.name: deriveKeyFromSeed
symbols.signature: async function deriveKeyFromSeed(seed: string, salt: string, undefined: unknown): Promise<string>
symbols.description: Derive an encryption key from seed and salt using PBKDF2 Returns hex-encoded key suitable for encrypt/decrypt functions

symbols.name: exportPrivateKeyPem
symbols.signature: async function exportPrivateKeyPem(privateKey: CryptoKey, label: string): Promise<string>

symbols.name: createSignedEncryptedMessage
symbols.signature: async function createSignedEncryptedMessage(data: Uint8Array, signers: Array<unknown>, recipientPublicKeyHex: string): Promise<SignedEncryptedMessage>

symbols.name: createSignedEncryptedMessage
symbols.signature: async function createSignedEncryptedMessage(paramsOrData: unknown | Uint8Array, signers?: Array<unknown>, recipientPublicKeyHex?: string): Promise<SignedEncryptedMessage>

symbols.name: encryptSymmetric
symbols.signature: async function encryptSymmetric(data: Uint8Array, keyHex: string): Promise<EncryptedPayload>
symbols.description: Encrypt data using a symmetric key (AES-GCM) provided as hex

symbols.name: decryptSymmetric
symbols.signature: async function decryptSymmetric(payload: EncryptedPayload, keyHex: string): Promise<Uint8Array>
symbols.description: Decrypt data using a symmetric key (AES-GCM) provided as hex

symbols.name: createSignedSymmetricMessage
symbols.signature: async function createSignedSymmetricMessage(data: Uint8Array, signers: Array<unknown>, keyHex: string): Promise<SignedSymmetricMessage>
symbols.description: Create a signed symmetric message (signs encrypted payload)

symbols.name: hmac
symbols.signature: async function hmac(key: string, data: string): Promise<string>
symbols.description: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of data with a key Returns hex-encoded 32-byte result

symbols.name: deriveSigningKeyPairFromSeed
symbols.description: Derive a deterministic Ed25519 signing keypair from a seed string. Uses HKDF to expand the seed into key material suitable for Ed25519.

symbols.name: deriveEncryptionKeyPairFromSeed
symbols.description: Derive a deterministic X25519 encryption keypair from a seed string. Uses HKDF to expand the seed into key material suitable for X25519.

symbols.name: extractPublicKeyHex
symbols.description: Extract the Ed25519 public key hex from an Ed25519 private CryptoKey. Useful for deriving a node ID from a PEM-imported private key.

symbols.name: generateCodeVerifier
symbols.description: Generate a PKCE code verifier (RFC 7636) 32 random bytes, base64url-encoded (43 characters)

symbols.name: generateCodeChallenge
symbols.description: Generate a PKCE code challenge from a verifier (RFC 7636, S256 method) SHA-256 hash of verifier, base64url-encoded (43 characters)
